heading: Chief of Legislative Liaison
label: 7023 Chief of Legislative Liaison
notes: Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 808(a)section 3023 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “section 7014(c)(1)(F)” for “section 3014(c)(1)(F)”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a)2016—Subsec. (a). struck out second sentence which read as follows: “An officer assigned to that position shall be an officer in the grade of major general.”Pub. L. 114–328

children.label: a
children.text: There is a Chief of Legislative Liaison in the Department of the Army.

children.label: b
children.text: The Chief of Legislative Liaison shall perform legislative affairs functions as specified for the Office of the Secretary of the Army by .section 7014(c)(1)(F) of this title
